home.title: Show up — there's a game forming near you.
home.subtitle: A mobile-first sports matching app for spontaneous football, tennis, basketball, and running groups in Timișoara.

proofCards.title: Deterministic first
proofCards.text: Hard matching rules stay explainable; AI enriches suggestions without owning eligibility gates.

proofCards.title: Event-scoped chat
proofCards.text: Group coordination and event threads are separate proof surfaces, not one combined message stream.

proofCards.title: Privacy-safe location
proofCards.text: Venue pins and approximate group centers are visible; exact home coordinates stay private.

proofCards.title: Honest Judge Mode
proofCards.text: Rubric rows must point to live, seeded, or fallback evidence before they are claimed.

signup.title: Create your ShowUp2Move account.
signup.body: Pick a username and password. We show one recovery code right after signup — the MVP does not use email or phone resets.
signup.cardTitle: Start with a private recovery code
signup.cardBody: Save it once. It's the only account-recovery path in this phase.

form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.recoveryBody: You'll need this code if you ever reset your password.
form.recoveryWarning: It will not be shown again.

login.title: Log in to keep the game moving.
login.body: You'll land back in the same session-backed MVP flow used by onboarding, matching, chat, and Judge Mode proof.
login.cardBody: Sessions are stored in an encrypted cookie.

form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again shortly.

recover.title: Reset access with your recovery code.
recover.body: This phase uses a one-time recovery code instead of email delivery, so the reset path stays demo-safe and deterministic.
recover.cardBody: A successful reset gives you a fresh recovery code.

form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.invalidRecovery: Username or recovery code is incorrect.
form.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again shortly.
form.successBody: Save this new recovery code. The old one no longer works.
form.recoveryWarning: It will not be shown again.

profile.title: Profile onboarding is next.
profile.body: Add the identity fields that group members see before sports, photo, location, and matching are enabled.
profile.cardBody: This is visible to matched groups and event members.

form.bioPlaceholder: What do you play, when are you usually free, and what kind of group feels right?
form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.unauthorized: Log in again before saving your profile.
form.fullNameRequired: Enter a real name using letters, spaces, apostrophes, or hyphens.
form.fullNameInvalid: Use letters, spaces, apostrophes, or hyphens for the name.
form.bioRequired: Add a short bio before continuing.
form.successBody: Sports, profile photo, and location are the next onboarding steps.

sports.title: Choose the sports you'd show up for.
sports.body: Pick at least one sport and set a skill level. These choices become the first deterministic matching gate.
sports.cardBody: Per-sport levels override the profile fallback when matching groups.

form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.unauthorized: Log in again before saving your sports.
form.successBody: Location and distance are the next proximity gate.

location.title: Set a private home area and radius.
location.body: Matching uses coordinates for distance checks, but the app only exposes public venues and approximate group centers.
location.cardBody: Timișoara defaults are available to keep the demo flow fast.

form.genericError: Check the details and try again.
form.unauthorized: Log in again before saving location.
form.cityRequired: Enter a city with at least two characters.
form.successBody: The account now has the required profile, sports, and proximity fields for ShowUpToday.

today.title: ShowUpToday
today.body: Answer once for the active Romania prompt window. A Yes response queues you for deterministic matching in the next slice.

card.matchedBody: A deterministic group exists for this prompt. Group chat and confirmation land in the next slice.
card.noMatchBody: Your response is saved, but there aren't enough nearby compatible players yet.
card.queuedBody: Your response is saved and will be reconsidered as more compatible players answer.
card.unavailableBody: Your response is saved and can be changed while this prompt window is active.
card.genericError: Couldn't save the response. Check your session and try again.

demo.title: Judge Mode placeholder
demo.enabledBody: Demo proof is enabled by environment flag. Scoring rows stay unclaimed until later phases add live or seeded proof.
demo.disabledBody: Demo proof is disabled by environment flag. Scoring rows stay unclaimed until later phases add live or seeded proof.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: This route is not part of the current ShowUp2Move phase.
